_metadata.name: GitHub Actions Supply Chain Triage
_metadata.description: Authorized bug bounty workflow that reviews GitHub Actions workflow YAML for privileged pull request execution, broad token permissions, mutable action refs, self-hosted runners, and risky secret handling.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: GitHub Actions Supply Chain Triage
manifest.description: Review authorized public GitHub repositories for actionable GitHub Actions CI/CD supply-chain risk signals.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: GitHub Actions Supply Chain Triage
graph.description: Focused GitHub Actions workflow-risk triage for authorized bug bounty and supply-chain research.

runtimeInputs.label: GitHub repository URL
runtimeInputs.description: Public GitHub repository URL explicitly authorized for GitHub Actions workflow review.

runtimeInputs.label: Branch, tag, or commit
runtimeInputs.description: Git ref to inspect. Uses the repository default branch when omitted.

runtimeInputs.label: Authorization notes
runtimeInputs.description: Program scope, exclusions, and reporting constraints to include in the report.
